error_signature: Access blocked: n8n.cloud has not completed the Google verification process
title: Google Drive access blocked due to verification process
symptom: When trying to use the Google Drive node, users receive an error stating that access is blocked due to the Google verification process not being completed.
not_this_if: n8n.cloud has completed the Google verification process
The app is in production mode
root_cause: The error occurs because the Google application associated with n8n.cloud is still in testing mode, which restricts access to only approved test users. Without adding the user's email as a test user or switching the app to production, access will be denied.
fix_steps: Go to Google Cloud Console and navigate to APIs & Services → OAuth consent screen.
Change the Publishing status from Testing to In production.
Alternatively, add the email used in n8n as a test user under the Test users section.
agent_instruction: Change the Google OAuth app's status to production or add your email as a test user.
